headline: VCTR Proposes the Acquisition of JHG, Sees $500M in Cost Synergies
summary: Victory Capital proposes a fully financed acquisition of Janus Henderson and expects $500M in cost synergies from the transaction.

headline: Blackstone’s Private Credit Fund BCRED Sees Record Redemptions. The Worries Are Growing.
summary: Blackstone indicated it saw higher-than-expected redemption requests at its flagship private credit fund.

headline: Blackstone’s Gray: Market ‘noise’ fueled record redemptions from world’s largest private credit fund
summary: Blackstone president Jon Gray defended the quality of loans within the firm's flagship private credit fund.

headline: Blackstone: Don't Let Sentiment Obscure The Fundamentals (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Blackstone (BX) upgraded to Strong Buy: 2025 growth, record dry powder, 38% undervaluation and 4.91% yield. Read here for more details.
